title: International Paper Co (IP) CEO Mark Sutton on Q2 2022 Results Earnings Call Transcript
text: International Paper Co (NYSE:IP ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Mark Nellessen - VP, IR Mark Sutton - Chairman and CEO Timothy Nicholls - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Mark Weintraub - Seaport Research Partners Gabe Hajde - Wells Fargo Securities George Staphos - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Mark Wilde - BMO Capital Markets Kyle White - Deutsche Bank Adam Josephson - KeyBanc Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Phil Ng - Jefferies Cleve Rueckert - UBS Operator Good morning, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to today's International Paper's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: International Paper (IP) Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates in Q2
text: International Paper's (IP) second-quarter results reflect benefits from higher demand. The ongoing momentum in demand is expected to aid results in 2022.

title: What's in the Offing for International Paper's (IP) Q2 Earnings?
text: International Paper's (IP) Q2 performance will likely reflect solid demand for packaging and pulp products. Higher costs might have dented some of these gains.

title: BlackRock Sees More Volatility Ahead: ETF Strategies to Follow
text: According to strategists at BlackRock Inc., stock volatility will remain rife in the coming days.

title: International Paper: A Tradeable Range With A High Dividend
text: Energy and some Materials industries were hot to start the year before a recent sharp selloff. International Paper has struggled, but a cheap valuation and high dividend offer long-term fundamental investors opportunities.

title: 7 Best Basic Materials Stocks to Buy Now
text: With the Russian invasion of Ukraine imposing a massive paradigm shift, it's time to load up on the best basic materials stocks to buy. The post 7 Best Basic Materials Stocks to Buy Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.
